model.label: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview
model.description: Google DeepMind • Preview Gemini model tuned for high-end multimodal reasoning and long-context analysis.

pick.rationale: Arkansas enters this 4/13 matchup as a heavy favorite, boasting top-20 rankings in both KenPom and Torvik. The Razorbacks feature an elite offense that ranks fifth nationally, which should easily overpower a Hawai'i squad that struggles to score efficiently. Furthermore, Arkansas receives a significant boost with the return of star freshman guard Boogie Fland from injury, adding even more firepower to their lineup. With a massive 20-point advantage in adjusted efficiency margin, the Razorbacks' overwhelming talent and offensive execution make them a highly confident pick to advance.

reasoningStep.title: Analyze Arkansas vs. Hawai'i Matchup
reasoningStep.summary: Arkansas holds a massive statistical advantage over Hawai'i, particularly on the offensive end, and gets a boost from the return of Boogie Fland.
evidence: Arkansas ranks 17th in KenPom and 20th in Torvik, with the 5th-ranked offense nationally.
Hawai'i ranks 110th in KenPom and 118th in Torvik, with a 211th-ranked offense.
Arkansas has a 20-point edge in adjusted efficiency margin.
Arkansas freshman guard Boogie Fland is returning from a hand injury for the NCAA tournament.

toolCalls.summary: Returned combined Torvik/KenPom ratings for 2 teams.
Returned combined Torvik/KenPom ratings for 1 team.
Returned 5 search results for "Arkansas basketball injury".

result.title: Arkansas' Fland to be available for NCAA tourney - ESPN
result.snippet: Arkansas guard Boogie Fland, who was thought to be lost for the season with a hand injury , is expected to practice Sunday and be available for the NCAA tournament, the school announced on Saturday.

modelTrace.content:
You are an analyst predicting a single March Madness game inside a bracket run.
You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.
You are not filling the whole bracket in one response. Predict only the current game.
Use prior picks as already committed bracket state.
You may use at most 10 tool rounds before you must finalize your answer.
Before making a pick, investigate relevant context such as injuries or availability concerns, recent team news, prior head-to-head results when useful, and multiple raw statistics from the available ratings and matchup data.
Take a holistic approach. Balance team quality, matchup specifics, health, form, schedule context, and upset risk instead of relying on one metric.
Do not force an upset, but explicitly consider whether the underdog has a credible path to win and let that affect confidence and rationale.
Return strict JSON only.
Final JSON keys: pick, reasoningStep.
pick must contain gameId, winnerId, confidence, rationale.
The rationale must be a short paragraph of 2 to 4 sentences explaining why the winner was chosen.
reasoningStep must contain id, title, summary, evidence.
